# Marlowe

> Private care coordination for older adults and their aging parents. Members get one
> dedicated care advisor who manages doctors, appointments, medical records,
> medications, transport, and second opinions — and explains everything in plain language.

Marlowe is a paid membership service (not an insurer or medical provider). It is
built for affluent adults in their 60s managing their own care and/or coordinating care for
elderly parents, including parents who live in another state.

## What care coordination means here
- One named advisor (often a registered nurse) per household
- Appointment scheduling, prep, and transport arrangement
- All medical records gathered into one secure, HIPAA-compliant place
- Medication tracking and interaction checks
- Plain-English summaries after every visit
- Priority second-opinion concierge for serious diagnoses
- A 24/7 line for urgent questions

## Membership
- Individual: $295/month (billed annually) — one person
- Household: $495/month (billed annually) — up to four family members across states
- 30-day full-refund promise; every membership starts with a free introductory call

## Key pages
- Home / overview: https://marlowe-63ge.vercel.app/
- Pricing (machine-readable): https://marlowe-63ge.vercel.app/pricing.md
- Contact: (800) 421-7700

## Important
Marlowe does not practice medicine, make medical decisions, or replace a member's
physicians. In an emergency, call 911.
